headline: The Hidden Engine That Could Power Exxon Mobil Stock Higher
summary: While all eyes are on its giant oil fields, the real surprise for Exxon might be coming from its massive, and suddenly very profitable, refining business.

raw.headline: The Hidden Engine That Could Power Exxon Mobil Stock Higher

headline: Valero Stock Surges 53.3% in Six Months: Should Investors Buy Now?
summary: VLO stock surges 53.3% in six months as Gulf Coast refining advantages, feedstock flexibility and shareholder returns bolster its investment case.

headline: Five Below and Builders FirstSource have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Five Below raised FY26 guidance after strong sales and earnings growth, while Builders FirstSource faces pressure from weak demand and margin strain.
